sections.paragraph:
χρήσιμος, η, ον (χράομαι; Theognis [406] +) useful, beneficial, advantageous IEph 4:2. τινί for someone (PSI 400, 4 [III b.c.] σοὶ χρήσιμος) Mt 20:28 D. ἐπί τι (Pla., Gorg. 480b, 481b, Leg. 7, 796a; Plut., Mar. 10, 10) ἐπʼ οὐδέν (PCairZen 225, 3 [253 b.c.] ἐπʼ οὐθὲν χρήσιμος) 2 Ti 2:14. εἴς τι (X., Vect. 4, 42; Pla., Leg. 7, 796 D.; Ezk 15:4) 2 Ti 2:14 v.l. (Tat. 19, 1); Hv 4, 3, 4.—Larfeld I 502. DELG s.v. χρης-4. Frisk s.v. χρή. M-M.

Theognis Theognis , VI b.c.—List 5

IEph IEph = Ignatius to the Ephesians—List 1

PSI PSI = Papiri greci e latini: Pubblicazioni della Società Italiana—List 4

D D = Didache, except that in a list of manuscripts or as textual variant D refers to Codex Bezae—List 1

Pla Pla , V–IV b.c.; s. also Ps.-Plato—List 5

Plut Plut , I–II a.d.—List 5

PCairZen PCairZen = Zenon Papyri, Catalogue général . . . du Musée du Caire—List 4

  1. X. = Xenophon, V–IV b.c.—List 5

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

Tat Tat , II a.d.—List 5

Hv Hv = Visions

Larfeld Larfeld = WL., Handbuch der griechischen Epigraphik—Lists 3, 6

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Frisk Frisk = HF., Griechisches etymologisches Wörterbuch—List 6

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 1089
